reason: Correct Mauritania ITS to the official monthly salary method: deduct capped worker CNSS, apply the MRU 6,000 exemption, round taxable remuneration down to MRU 10, and use the 15%, 25%, and 40% bands. Cap worker and employer social contributions at the official MRU 15,000 monthly base.

fixtureDeltas.reason: At MRU 1,000,000 annual gross, monthly worker CNSS is capped at MRU 150 and the published exemption, rounding, and monthly ITS bands are applied before annualization.
The large-value fixture now keeps CNSS capped, applies the monthly exemption and MRU 10 floor, and uses the published 40% top band.
